query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white nighttime photograph of a street lined with dense bushes and trees. A bright streetlamp stands in the middle distance, its light diffused through heavy fog. Another light source appears at the upper right corner. The paved road curves in the foreground, bordered by a low curb. Thick foliage occupies the midground on both sides, while faint tree trunks and distant structures recede into the fog-shrouded background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white nighttime photograph of a street lined with dense bushes and trees, rendered in washed-out, low-vibrancy monochrome with oppressive low contrast that produces a heavy, suffocating atmosphere. A bright streetlamp stands in the middle distance, its light diffused through heavy fog that contributes to a mood of dread and isolation. Another light source appears at the upper right corner. The paved road curves in the foreground, bordered by a low curb, while thick foliage and fading tree trunks recede into a melancholic, hazy background.
